summary: Completed testing of Username Feature for Caca Radar. All 17 backend tests pass. Frontend registration page has username field with validation hints. UsernamePrompt modal correctly appears for existing users without username and disappears after saving. New users with username go straight to map. 'Made with Emergent' badge does not overlap Sign Up link.
passed_tests: Registration with valid username succeeds (returns needs_username=false)
Registration without username returns 422 validation error
Registration with short username (<3 chars) returns 400
Registration with long username (>20 chars) returns 400
Login for user WITH username returns needs_username=false
Frontend RegisterPage has username input field with data-testid
Frontend shows username validation hints (3-20 chars, letters/numbers/underscores)
Frontend UsernamePrompt modal appears for user without username
Frontend UsernamePrompt disappears after successfully saving username
Frontend new user with username goes straight to map without prompt
'Made with Emergent' badge does not overlap Sign Up link on login/register pages
seed_data_creation: Created test user without username (no_username_test@test.com / Test1234!) to test UsernamePrompt modal
context_for_next_testing_agent: Username feature fully implemented and tested. Registration now requires username field. Existing users without username see UsernamePrompt modal on login. PUT /api/users/username endpoint works without premium subscription requirement. Test file at /app/backend/tests/test_username_feature.py covers all username validation scenarios.
